examples: Upper Neoproterozoic Shuangqiaoshan Group phyllite, arenopelitic shale;
The host-rock of the ore deposit is phyllite and slate of Middle Devonian.
The rock mass consists of fresh sericite quartz phyllite or fresh leptynite.
Butz said the six "ovens" formed naturally as a result of spherical deposits of quartz eroding out of the phyllite rock face.
